raw_consumer_statement: My card was used to book travel that wasn't authorized on XX/XX/2024 and after speaking to XXXX XXXX and XXXX, they still haven't refunded my money. I didn't authorize a booking and I am requesting that I get reimbursed fully for the {$640.00}. How am I responsible for an unauthorized charge. It's is so unfortunate that after explaining that I never authorized a transaction that I wasn't able to get my funds back after speaking to my card company. I will be speaking to my attorney if I don't receive my full reimbursement for this unauthorized transaction.
